description: Transform dashboard into action-oriented command center with quick actions, streak, economic calendar, and recent trades

userStories.title: Audit Existing Utilities for Dashboard Command Center
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit existing code before implementing the dashboard command center so that we reuse utilities and avoid duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Search src/lib/ for existing P&L calculation utilities
Search src/lib/ for existing date/time formatting utilities
Search src/lib/ for existing currency formatting utilities
Search components/routers for local helpers doing similar work
Document findings in scripts/ralph/progress.txt with file:line references
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Completed: Documented all existing utilities with file:line references in progress.txt

userStories.title: Add Economic Events Database Schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database schema for economic calendar events so that we can cache and serve calendar data efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add eventImpactEnum to schema.ts with values: low, medium, high
Add economicEvents table with fields: id, name, currency, category, eventTime, actual, forecast, previous, impact, source, fetchedAt
Add indexes on eventTime and currency columns
Add unique constraint on (name, currency, eventTime) for upsert support
Add economicEvent ID generator to src/lib/shared/id.ts
Run bun run db:push successfully
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Completed: Added eventImpactEnum, economicEvents table with all fields, indexes, unique constraint, and ID generator

userStories.title: Create Economic Calendar Constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared constants for economic calendar features so that styling and configuration is centralized.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/constants/economic-calendar.ts
Export EVENT_IMPACT_COLORS with bg/text/border classes for each impact level
Export MAJOR_CURRENCIES array: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, AUD, CAD, NZD
Export HIGH_IMPACT_KEYWORDS array for impact classification
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Completed: Created economic-calendar.ts with EVENT_IMPACT_COLORS, MAJOR_CURRENCIES, HIGH_IMPACT_KEYWORDS and type exports

userStories.title: Create Economic Calendar tRPC Router
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want API endpoints to query economic events so that the dashboard can display today's calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/server/api/routers/economicCalendar.ts
Implement getTodayEvents query with optional currency/impact filters
Implement getUpcoming query for next 24 hours with configurable limit
Both procedures use protectedProcedure
Register router in src/server/api/root.ts
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Completed: Created economicCalendarRouter with getTodayEvents and getUpcoming queries, registered in root.ts

userStories.title: Add Recent Trades Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an endpoint to fetch recent trades so that the dashboard can show a quick trades list.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getRecent query to src/server/api/routers/trades.ts
Accept limit (default 5, max 10) and optional accountId parameters
Return trades ordered by entryTime descending
Respect active accounts filter when no accountId specified
Include account relation in response
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Completed: Added getRecent query with limit, accountId, active accounts filter, and account relation

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Economic Calendar Router
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for economic calendar endpoints so that we verify correct behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/integration/economic-calendar.test.ts
Test getTodayEvents returns events within today's date range
Test getTodayEvents filters by currency when provided
Test getTodayEvents filters by impact when provided
Test getUpcoming respects limit parameter
Test empty results handled gracefully
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Completed: Created 19 tests covering getTodayEvents (date range, currency/impact filters), getUpcoming (limit, hoursAhead), and empty results handling

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Trades getRecent
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the getRecent endpoint so that we verify correct behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests to tests/integration/trades.test.ts in new describe block
Test returns trades ordered by entryTime descending
Test respects limit parameter
Test filters by accountId when provided
Test respects active accounts when no accountId specified
Test returns empty array when no trades exist
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Completed: Created 16 tests in tests/integration/trades/get-recent.test.ts covering ordering, limit, accountId filter, active accounts filter, empty results, and soft-deleted trades exclusion

userStories.title: Create Trigger.dev Economic Calendar Sync Task
userStories.description: As the system, I want a scheduled job to fetch economic calendar data hourly so that users always see up-to-date events.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/trigger/sync-economic-calendar.ts
Implement scheduled task with cron 0 * * * * (hourly)
Fetch from JBlanked API /forex-factory/calendar/week/ endpoint
Parse event data and determine impact level based on keywords
Upsert events to database (update existing, insert new)
Log sync results (count synced, any errors)
Handle missing API key gracefully (skip with warning)
Document JBLANKED_API_KEY env variable requirement in .env.example
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Completed: Created sync-economic-calendar.ts with scheduled cron task (hourly), JBlanked API fetch, impact classification using keywords, database upsert, graceful API key handling, and added JBLANKED_API_KEY to env.js

userStories.title: Dashboard UI - Header with Streak and Quick Actions
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a streamlined dashboard header with my journaling streak and quick action buttons so that I can start my day efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the 5 stat cards (Net P&L, Win Rate, Profit Factor, Avg Win, Avg Loss)
Remove Performance Summary card
Keep Start Journal Hero at top (existing component)
Add header section with Command Center label and Dashboard title
Add JournalingStreak component showing flame icon + day count (use existing getStreak API)
Add QuickActionsBar with two buttons: [+ Log Trade] linking to /trade/new, [Import CSV] linking to /import
Responsive layout: stack on mobile, row on desktop
Terminal design system: monospace fonts, chartreuse accent
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: streak displays, buttons navigate correctly

userStories.title: Dashboard UI - Today's Snapshot Component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see a quick summary of today's trading activity so that I know my current status at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Create TodaysSnapshot component in dashboard page
Query today's trades using existing dailyJournal.getWithTrades or trades API
Display single line: Today: X trades, +$Y or No trades today
P&L colored green (profit) or red (loss) using design system colors
Show loading skeleton while fetching
Compact card styling with border
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: shows correct trade count and P&L

userStories.title: Dashboard UI - Economic Calendar Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see today's high-impact economic events so that I can plan my trading around news releases.
acceptanceCriteria: Create EconomicCalendarWidget component in dashboard page
Fetch events using economicCalendar.getTodayEvents API
Display up to 5 events with: currency badge, event name, time
Color-code by impact: high (red), medium (yellow), low (gray)
Show No high-impact events today when empty
Terminal-style card with header showing Economic Calendar and clock icon
Loading skeleton while fetching
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: events display with correct styling

userStories.title: Dashboard UI - Recent Trades Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my recent trades on the dashboard so that I can quickly review recent activity and navigate to trade details.
acceptanceCriteria: Create RecentTradesWidget component in dashboard page
Fetch trades using trades.getRecent API (limit 5)
Display each trade with: direction badge (LONG/SHORT), symbol, date, P&L
Direction badge colored: long=green, short=red
P&L colored by profit/loss
Each trade row is clickable, navigates to /journal/{tradeId}
View All link in header navigates to /journal
Empty state: No trades yet with link to log first trade
Terminal-style card with header
Two-column grid layout with Economic Calendar widget on desktop
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: trades display, clicking navigates to detail
